title: Longest Chunked Palindrome Decomposition
hints: Consider checking the shortest possible prefix and suffix. If they match, you can count two parts and recurse on the middle. If not, try slightly longer prefixes.
This is a greedy problem. Always take the smallest valid matching prefix and suffix to maximize the total number of parts.
Use two pointers starting at the ends. Expand the current prefix and suffix strings until they match, then increment the count and move pointers inward.
